plugin_backup.title: Backup
plugin_backup.description: Backup management for boot, appdata and libvirt
plugin_backup.boot_destination_hint: Directory where boot backup archives will be stored
plugin_backup.appdata_source_hint: Read from Docker settings (configure in Docker service)
plugin_backup.compression_hint: Compress the backup archive (.tar.gz instead of .tar)
plugin_backup.stop_containers_hint: Select containers that should be stopped before backup and restarted after
plugin_backup.no_containers_hint: Click refresh to load available containers
plugin_backup.no_dirs_hint: Click refresh to load available directories
plugin_backup.backup_all_hint: Runs all configured backup types in parallel
plugin_backup.name: Name
